markdownRemark.html:
Tool Stack

Value Proposition

  • YouTube (video hosting)
  • Buffer (social media automation)
  • LinkedIn (professional network)
  • Medium (blog)
  • Mailchimp or ConvertKit (email marketing)
  • Bill.com (receiving payments)
  • Teachable (online courses)
  • Clarity (call scheduling/billing)
  • Atom (text editor)
  • Audacity (audio editor)

Business Affairs

  • Skype (video calls)
  • Zoom (group video calls)
  • Beautiful.ai (slide presentations)
  • Typeform (surveys)
  • Paypal (payments)
  • InVision (mind-maps)

Personal

  • Trello
  • Notion
  • GitHub
  • MediaFire
  • Mint
  • Google Calendar
  • Gmail
  • Social media
